perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a brown jacket stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, pointing at a large display of blue Febreze product boxes with an excited expression. (2) A second woman wearing a white hat enters the frame; they both hold product boxes and gesture toward the camera with high energy. (3) The scene transitions to a modern bathroom where the first woman, now in a grey dress, explains the product's features while pointing at a shower area and floor tiles. (4) Close-up shots show the packaging and a hand pressing the activation button on the back of the air freshener unit. (5) The two women are seen sitting by a bathtub, discussing the product's benefits in a humid climate. (6) The video ends with an outdoor shot in front of a Costco building, where both women hold the product and encourage viewers to buy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat pop background music starts immediately. An enthusiastic female voice begins a high-energy sales pitch about Black Friday deals. (2) A second female voice joins in, expressing surprise and excitement with 'What? Is this really good?'. (3) The primary narrator provides a detailed explanation of the product's mold-prevention technology, maintaining a friendly and persuasive tone. (4) A distinct 'click' or 'pop' sound effect (SFX) is heard when the product button is pressed on-screen. (5) The music continues at a consistent volume as the two women conclude with a synchronized call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '去年黑五賣到缺貨的' (Sold out last Black Friday) - Hook text used to create urgency. (2) '好事多黑五必買 風倍清浴廁專用蛋' (Costco Black Friday Must-Buy: Febreze Bathroom Egg) - Identifying the product and event. (3) '11/24-11/30 折了150元' (Dates and 150 TWD discount) - Functional information. (4) '只需輕壓按放' (Just press and place) - Instructional text with a helpful tone. (5) '不僅防霉味還防臭' (Not only prevents mold but also deodorizes) - Highlighting key benefits. (6) '趕快手刀去買' (Hurry up and buy) - High-energy call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Problem/Solution demonstration in bathroom -> Promotion details outdoors

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 4 passers-by in the background of the store and outdoor scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian females; one has long dark hair and wears a brown jacket/grey dress, the other wears a light blue ruffled top and a white baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse-style Costco store with tall shelves, a clean modern bathroom with white wavy tiles and a glass shower, and a Costco store exterior with a parking lot.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright commercial lighting and natural daylight.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To advertise a specific household product (Febreze Bathroom Air Freshener) by leveraging the hype of Costco's Black Friday sale. The video uses a relatable problem-solution format, focusing on Taiwan's humid weather to justify the purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, explanation of benefits, and mentioning a specific sale price and location.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy duo dialogue and dense variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a common social media marketing format in Asia, combining 'shopping haul' aesthetics with practical product demonstrations.
